passive_events.message: You drank out of date milk and got food poisoning.
You received an unexpected tax rebate from your summer job!
You parked in a restricted zone. The council was faster than you.
You found a £5 note in the pocket of your winter coat!
The library bought back your old textbooks at a good price.
A sudden toothache required an emergency trip to the dentist.
Your grandmother sent you a card with some birthday cash.
You dropped your phone and the screen is a spiderweb of glass.
Your energy provider overcharged you and sent a refund.
You lost your wallet and had to pay for new IDs and cards.
You covered a shift for a colleague and got a nice bonus.
You realized you spent way too much on lattes this month.
Subscription prices went up. Your bank account felt the sting.
You sold some old clothes on Vinted. Clean room, full wallet.
You forgot to cancel that trial gym membership. Automatic renewal!
You participated in a psychology study for quick cash.
Your train was 2 hours late, but the 'Delay Repay' arrived.
It's raining and your shoes have a hole. You had to buy new ones.
That book was due weeks ago. The fines have stacked up.
Your tutor praised your latest essay. You're feeling motivated!
You caught a minor bug. Spent a fortune on medicine.
A small toaster fire ruined your breakfast and the toaster.
An online survey site actually paid out for once.
An annual software subscription just hit your account.
You placed a small bet on the football and your team won.
You lost your monthly bus pass and had to pay for a new one.
